summary: Frontend testing of 6 new social media pages (Watch, Marketplace, Groups, Events, Memories, Gaming). All routes (/watch, /marketplace, /groups, /events, /memories, /gaming) are accessible and load correctly. All pages have proper UI structure with tabs, categories, search inputs, and mock data generation. Backend APIs for these pages don't exist - all data is MOCKED client-side.

minor.issue: Endpoints do not exist - pages use client-side mock data

ui_bugs.issue: Video grid and listing grid sometimes empty despite mock data generation. May be timing/race condition in useEffect

passed_tests: Watch page has video categories: For You, Live, Reels, Music, Gaming, Following, Saved
Marketplace page has categories: All, Vehicles, Electronics, Clothing, Furniture, Family, Sports
Marketplace page has search input and filter/view mode buttons
Groups page has tabs: Your Feed, Discover, Your Groups
Groups page shows empty state when no groups joined
Events page has tabs: Upcoming, Calendar, Your Events
Events Calendar view shows month navigation with correct date (March 2026)
Memories page shows 'On This Day' feature with date navigation
Memories page shows proper empty state: 'No memories for this day'
Gaming page has tabs: Play, Watch, Tournaments
Gaming Watch tab shows LIVE streams with viewer counts
All routes configured in App.js with ProtectedRoute wrapper
LeftSidebar (FacebookSidebar.jsx) contains navigation links to new pages
Pages use responsive design with BottomNav component
action_items: Investigate why Watch and Marketplace mock data grids are sometimes empty - may need to check useEffect timing or add fallback state
Consider adding backend API endpoints for these pages in future iterations
critical_code_review_comments: Watch.jsx: generateMockVideos() creates 12 mock video objects with thumbnails from picsum.photos, but grid sometimes renders empty
Marketplace.jsx: generateMockListings() creates 8 mock listing items, but grid sometimes renders empty - similar issue to Watch
Groups.jsx: Well-structured with GroupFeed, GroupCard components and proper empty states
Events.jsx: Calendar implementation works correctly, generates 6 mock events with proper date handling
Memories.jsx: Clean implementation of 'On This Day' feature with year-based memory sections
Gaming.jsx: Shows content correctly - streams with LIVE badges, game cards with ratings - mock data working properly here
FacebookSidebar.jsx: LeftSidebar has proper navigation items for all 6 new pages in mainItems and moreItems arrays
All pages use same pattern: fetch from API, catch error, fallback to generateMock*() - consistent but backend APIs don't exist

success_rate.backend: N/A (no backend APIs for these pages)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test account from iteration 36
context_for_next_testing_agent: 6 new social media pages tested: Watch, Marketplace, Groups, Events, Memories, Gaming. All routes work (/watch, /marketplace, /groups, /events, /memories, /gaming). Backend APIs don't exist - all pages use MOCKED client-side data via generateMock*() functions. Gaming page shows mock content correctly, but Watch and Marketplace grids sometimes empty (timing issue). Events calendar works, Memories shows empty state correctly. LeftSidebar in FacebookSidebar.jsx has navigation links but may be hidden behind BottomNav on some screen sizes.

mocked_features.note: ALL 6 NEW PAGES USE MOCKED DATA - NO BACKEND APIS EXIST
pages_with_mock_data: Memories: generateMockMemories() - memories from 1-5 years ago

Events.content: Calendar view works, shows March 2026, today (18) highlighted

Memories.content: Empty state: 'No memories for this day' - correct behavior

Gaming.content: LIVE streams showing with viewer counts (3.5K watching), game cards visible
